title: Gin’s Gratitude Reveals Sanji’s Kindness
description: On pages 18–18, Sanji feeds Gin despite the danger, revealing that his compassion for the hungry matters more to him than restaurant rules or pirate labels.
scene: Gin arrives broken and starving, while the Baratie cooks judge him as an enemy; Sanji alone treats hunger as something that must be answered.

dialogue.speaker: Don Krieg
dialogue.text: D-Don KrieG! This is different from what you promised!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: I guided you here because you promised not to harm this restaurant!

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: Not only that, that man is our Saviour!

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: Ahh, that was a great meal. I feel like I'm back to my normal self again...

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: So he reveals his fangs at last...

summary: This part reveals the core of Sanji’s morality: no matter who a person is, he cannot ignore someone starving in front of him.
